subcodes.first_line: O God, Who dost aid the sincere ones to tread the straight path and to enter the paradise of delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا موید المخلصین علی السلوک علی صراط مستقیم و الورود فی جنه النعیم و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
